dqekj lDlsuk] vapy lnL;] ¼if'pe vapy½ dks mDr vk;ksx ds v/;{k ds :i esa fu;qDr djrh gSA 3- vk;ksx ds izR;sd lnL; ¼insu lnL;ksa dks NksM+dj½ ljdkjh jkti= esa bl vf/klwpuk ds izdk'ku dh rkjh[k ls rhu o"kZ dh vof/k ds fy, in /kkfjr djsxkA [Qk- la- ,&43013@6@2015&dsohvkbZ&ih] lqjsUnz ukFk f=ikBh] vij lfpo ,oa fodkl vk;qDr MINISTRY OF MICRO, SMALL AND MEDIUM ENTERPRISES NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 26th October, 2015 S.O. 2922(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred under sub-section (3) of section 25 and of section 4 of the Khadi and Village Industries Commission Act, 1956 (61 of 1956), (hereinafter referred to as the said Act), read with rules 3 and 4 of the Khadi and Village Industries Commission Rules, 2006, the Central Government hereby re-establishes the Khadi and Village Industries Commission and appoints the following persons as members of such Commission, with effect from the date of publication of this notification in the Official Gazette, namely:— I. Zonal Members: [Under clause (a) of sub-section (2) of section 4 of the said Act] II. Non-official Expert Members: [Under clause (b) of sub-section (2) of section 4 of the said Act] Discipline (1). Shri Ashok Bhagat, Vikas Bharti Bishunpur, 19 Gramayatan, Aarogya Bhawan, 1-Baryatu Road, Ranchi- 834008, Jharkhand. Rural Development Part Time (1) Western Zone Shri Vinai Kumar Saxena, 9, Prerna Kutir Bungalows, Near Sarathi Hotel, Vastrapur, Ahmedabad-53 Full Time (2) Central Zone Shri Jai Prakash Tomar, Village and Post: Rustampur Bawli, Tehsil:Baraut, District: Bagpat, Uttar Pradesh. Part Time (3) North Eastern Zone Shri Narayan Chandra Borkataky, Ex-MP. (Lok Sabha), H.No.11, Rukmini Nagar, Guwahati-781006. Part Time (4) South Zone Shri G. Chandramouli, # 12-11-1527/1, Bouddha Nagar, Warsiguda, Hyderabad-500061, Telangana. Part Time (5) East Dr. Sangeeta Kumari, Khadi Bhandar, Muzaffarpur-842002 (Bihar) Part Time -- 2 of 3 -- πHkkx IIμ [k.M 3(ii)∫ Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 3 III. Ex-Officio Members: (Under clauses (ba), (c) and (d) of sub-section (2) of section 4 of the said Act) (1) Chairman, State Bank of India (2) Chief Executive Officer, Khadi and Village Industries Commission (3) Financial Adviser, Khadi and Village Industries Commission 2. In exercise of the powers conferred under sub-section (3) of section 4 of the said Act, the Central Government hereby appoints Shri Vinai Kumar Saxena, zonal member (Western Zone), as the Chairman of the said Commission. 3. Every member of the Commission (other than ex-officio members) shall hold office for a period of three years from the date of publication of this notification in the Official Gazette. [F. No. A-43013/6/2015-KVI-P] SURENDER NATH TRIPATHI, Addl. Secy. and Development Commissioner.
